posttips: The dates given above are the effective dates of instructions of scheduled transaction.
paymentreq_notes0: 1. Daily General Bill Payment Limit is HKD100,000，and daily Tax Payment Limit is HKD500,000. Small-value Fund Transfer rolling limit is HKD5,000 over 2 consecutive days (one day before the transaction day and the transaction day itself ).
paymentreq_notes: 2. Within the Small-value Fund Transfer limit, customer can carry on fund transfer to non-registered third-party accounts, or bill payment to high risk merchants without token authentication. This limit applies to fund transfers within our bank, to other local and overseas banks, ICBC EXPRESS , One-stop Transfer & Remittance, Withdraw Time Deposit, high risk merchants’ Bill Payment and e-Bill Presentment and Payment.
paymentreq_notes1: 3. Customer can adjust bill payment/ transfer limit through “Customer Service > Account Settings > Adjust Transaction Limit” in Vertical menu, or “Customer Service > Adjust Transaction Limit” in Horizontal menu. Customer must use token authentication to raise limit.
paymentreq_notes2: 4. Exclude bill payment by small-value fund transfer, two-factor authentication is required to conduct a bill payment transaction when the receiving merchant falls into high risk categories (e.g. money service operator or agent that provides services or products that can be easily converted to money such as remittance agent, money changer, jewellery companies, casino, finance/loans related service such as stock agents, credit card merchants).
paymentreq_notes3: 5. Please note that the execution of bill payment is subject to daily accumulative bill payment limit on the payment day. If your payment exceeds the available daily limit on execution day, the payment instruction may not be processed. Please retain sufficient balance in debit account to ensure successful bill payment at the appointed time. In addition, if you pay the bill by credit card, please ensure available credit limit for credit card account at the time of instruction process.
paymentreq_notes4: 6. Customer can check the status of post-dated bill payment through “Bill Payment ->Post-dated Transaction Enquiry”.
paymenttemptips: This transaction will be saved as template after you submit the transaction successfully.
paymentm303tips: From January 13, 2014 onwards, the maximum daily Tax Payment Limit for the Personal Internet Banking has been raised from HKD200,000 to HKD500,000. Please visit any branch to request for amendment of the transaction limit if necessary.
paymenterrorcc: Sorry, the bill payment amount exceeds your available credit limit. The instruction cannot be executed.

completedposttip: Please ensure that there is enough available account balance (or credit limit) on the bill payment execution date.

creditcard_cfm:
Remark:
1. If bill payment amount is paid for other bank's credit card, this transaction is treated as “Cash Advance” transaction,a handling charge and interest will be collected.
2. Interest calculated on daily basis on each cash advance from the date of such advance until the date upon which it is fully repaid in full.
